name: Shell Canada Limited
description: Shell Canada Limited is the principal Canadian subsidiary of the British energy major Shell plc and stands as one of Canada's largest integrated oil and gas companies. Headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, the company is actively involved in the exploration, production, and refining of oil, natural gas, and sulphur. As a key player in the Canadian energy sector, Shell Canada operates extensive retail, commercial, and industrial networks, contributing significantly to the nation's energy supply while transitioning toward lower-carbon energy solutions as part of its broader global corporate strategy.
